question:
Fill in the blank with the missing number:

Bobby can deadlift 300 pounds at 13.  When he is 18 he can deadlift 100 pounds more than _______% of his previous deadlift.  How many pounds did he add per year?
response:
Bobby can deadlift 300 pounds at 13. When he is 18 he can deadlift 100 pounds more than 40% of his previous deadlift. 

I think 40% because 100 pounds is 1/3 of 300 pounds, and 1/3 is about 33%, so 40% seems close. Then, he added 100 pounds over 5 years, so he added 20 pounds per year.
